docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,080.96 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE ROBERT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELMORE ROBERT $3,080.96 PRINCIPAL, $28.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,109.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,025.66 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE ROBERT
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE ROBERT
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ELMORE ROBERT
